rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0020
rows.name: Notes left behind by the Ancient Samaarians[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0050
rows.name:
"The one possessing the most supreme intellect since
the birth of time and space in this universe[ST:wide ]—"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0060
rows.name:
"Though a brethren of Samaar, this one
brought about an irreversible calamity."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0070
rows.name:
"This one must be punished. However,
condemnation by death violates our laws."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0080
rows.name:
"The attrition of intellect through eternal confinement[ST:wide ]—
A prison of the soul is truly fitting for this one."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0100
rows.name: They must be talking about Void, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0110
rows.name: Either way, there seems to be no doubt[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200120_MSG0120
rows.name: that this place is a prison for Void.[ST:wait ]
